message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
welcome maya
Internet's definitely sluggish, was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team, we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days, it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
i've places and order
i will try and place one now
so will i
The site works fine for me, its not even slow
speak for yourself, im still trying to load the cart
could anyone having issues with internet let me know
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
so we can navigate a root cause
mine is a bit slow, it doesnt seem to be as slow as shays but it take a few seconds to load things
@hamed what weird traffic did you see?
:star: Facts over opinion
let me take a closer look into it
@tanya could you check the anomalies and let me know how it looks
:star: Manage actions and timings
also @shay when did you start seeing internet issues?
sure i will take a look into the logs
they have been going on all day but the past 30 mins has REALLY shown the issues on my end
@channel could we please like this message if you seem to be having issues
whats going on?
There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on.
could this be change-related?
how could this impact the network?
im reaching out to the network team to see if they are runing anything that may slow down the speeds
*Incident Number INC100047:* sev 3
i have a list of the changes here
https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA
whats the issue description?
and how is this impacting users?
hey Bez - some people experiencing poor network quality
considering the fact the order dont seem to be going down
could this be an internal network issue
:star: Form a working theory
let me take a look
its possible
I can confirm this isnt just internal
we have reports from users on connection issues
im organising them to get some metrics for you
ok could we confirm is this global or a specific region?
Bob is organising them to get some metrics for us

50% of users impacted
40 out of the 50% have small issues like long load times, but can make purchases
10 out of the 50% have large issues and cannot use the site to make a purchase
in the meantime @daniel @maya  could you look further into network related issues / the traffic flows
global issue, the reports are random
:star: Form an effective investigation team
thanks bob
im here to help
@hamed you are in contact with the network team arent you?
thank @maya please check traffic flow
can anyone check firewall issues
yes i am, they are unable to see what the issue is, can you run some security scans please
good idea, i will run the scans and while that is going i will check the firewall
is this global? or impacting our sales?
ok @maya please do some security scans @daniel could you check if it is software related or may linked to any recent chnages
:star: Reviewed changes
i will check the changes now
Just ran a network security scan and our issues all seem to be related to our network switch trying to figure out what exactly.
when did we switch network
:star: Check changes done to the platform

Our investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside. It creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party
should we restart the switch?
yes can we please restart the switch
switch has been restarted
Ill try to place an order and check we're still getting these issues
Hopefully restarting was the correct solution
@shay could you retest
:star: Reproduces the incident
on it
Ummm Guys, tried to place an order and now im getting errors on the product selection page
Is anyone else getting the same?
Getting a lot of new reports, people are no longer able to access the products page at all
Sorry guys was hoping the restart would work, trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
If i remember correctly we do have recent changes involving the products page
Is the switch back up?
checking for that now
Change ID: CHG89573 and Change ID: CHG89692 both were made
There is one, i will have to make sure it is safe to swap over to, testing for the same vunrabilitys
Ok this switch is safe to swap over to, i can run that now once you give the green light Elsa
yes please swap over now maya
@shay can you test once we get confirmed that we have swapped
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
i will test now
Good job, can we confirm @elsa.savage-options-it.com?
No more errors for me on the site
great news
Thanks @maya for solving that today
we have resolved it now
any time
Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
we needed to swap the infected switch
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers, happy anniversary!
Really great job @elsa.savage-options-it.com.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
